markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss team structure, quality expectations, and client management strategies for GrowthX's content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current team structure needs realignment: Directors should lead strategy, MEs handle execution/client management, CMs focus on production](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Quality expectations and client communication need improvement, especially in first 12 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [New work streams (e.g. backlinking, PSEO) were sold before fully developed, causing some challenges](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [More intentional content strategy development and client onboarding process needed](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

## Topics

### Current Team Structure Issues

  - [Roles misaligned: CMs doing ME work, MEs trying to drive strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [New team members at all levels simultaneously onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Some key team members (e.g. Pratik, Jess) working long hours](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Lack of time for team members to fully learn workflows/tools](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

### Ideal Team Structure

  - [Directors: Lead strategy, client-facing in first 12 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Managing Editors: Handle execution, gradually take over client management](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Content Managers: Focus on production, minimal client interaction](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

### Content Strategy Development

  - [Need more intentional approach to understanding client/audience](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Use tools like Perplexity AI for research](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Develop clear content clusters and assignments before client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Show progress across multiple areas for high-budget clients](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)

### Work Stream Challenges

  - [Backlinking and PSEO sold before fully developed](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [Need to balance selling new capabilities with ability to deliver](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [Considering repositioning offerings (e.g. backlinking as part of broader distribution strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)

### Client Onboarding Process

  - [Directors should spend more time deeply understanding product/space](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Develop initial strategy and get alignment in early weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Hand-carve initial assignments to set direction before scaling production](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)

### Team Member Spotlight: Pratik

  - [Senior CM managing 5 clients ($4k-$9.5k budgets)](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3007.0)
  - [Strong execution but lacks ME support](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3086.0)
  - [May need additional support for higher-budget clients and client communication](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3156.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Branko to take more active role in driving strategy for clients immediately](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [New ME starting May 19th - consider how to integrate into team](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3066.0)
  - [Evaluate Sadira's potential for ME role or expanded senior CM responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3191.0)
  - [Reassess team structure to ensure proper support for all clients, especially higher-budget accounts](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Develop more robust content strategy development process using available tools and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8SdosYQzs7A2ymZ73SgFo6ebjabXKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
